def process_items(items: list[str]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for i in range(len(items)):
        results.append({"index": i, "value": items[i]})
    return results


def indexed_lookup(keys: list[str], values: list[int]) -> dict:
    mapping = {}
    for i in range(len(keys)):
        mapping[keys[i]] = values[i]
    return mapping


def debug_print(items: list):
    for i in range(len(items)):
        print(f"[{i}] {items[i]}")


def pair_with_indices(data: list[float]) -> list[tuple[int, float]]:
    pairs = []
    for i in range(len(data)):
        pairs.append((i, data[i]))
    return pairs
